---
name: Skill Issue
about: Report a problem with a specific skill
title: "[SKILL] "
labels: bug
---

**Which skill?**
e.g., `security-auditor`, `deployment-engineer`

**What repo did you test on?**
Link or description of the repo

**What happened?**
What did the agent do wrong?

**What should have happened?**
What was the expected behavior?

**Agent used:**
- [ ] Claude Code
- [ ] Cursor
- [ ] GitHub Copilot
- [ ] Other: ___
